name: matthiaskloft-claude-skills
description: Claude Code plugins for code quality, scientific computing, and Bayesian inference workflows.

plugins.name: code-sentinel
plugins.description: Orchestrates independent code review via specialised subagents that audit uncommitted changes for bugs, security issues, silent errors, and logical inconsistencies. Specialised for R and Python.

plugins.name: bayesflow-skills
plugins.description: Domain-specific skills for BayesFlow 2.x extension packages. Provides patterns for simulators, adapters, Keras 3 backend-agnostic math, testing, SBC validation, GPU memory management, and packaging conventions.

plugins.name: workflow-automation
plugins.description: Plan/Implement/Ship workflow for feature development. Provides skills for structured planning, worktree-based implementation, and automated review/PR/CI shipping.
